videos.headline: Blake Horvath punches in a TD on the opening drive for Navy
videos.description: Blake Horvath plows into the end zone to give Navy a 7-0 lead over Army in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath punches in a TD on the opening drive for Navy) 2024/12/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Eli Heidenreich races home for a 52-yard Navy TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath finds Eli Heidenreich near the sideline, who races in for a 55-yard Navy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Eli Heidenreich races home for a 52-yard Navy TD) 2024/12/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Navy secures big first down on fourth-down, fake-punt conversion
videos.description: Navy's defensive lineman Landon Robinson takes the ball on the fake punt and picks up a 22-yard first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Navy secures big first down on fourth-down, fake-punt conversion) 2024/12/14 ESHEET
